ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The future of .NET UI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
Language: c%23
This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for .NET. For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-net.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FlorianButz/DynamicWin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FlorianButz/DynamicWin
Language: c%23
A Dynamic Island inspired app for Windows machines.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MudBlazor/MudBlazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor
Language: c%23
Blazor Component Library based on Material Design principles. Do more with Blazor, utilizing CSS and keeping JavaScript to a bare minimum.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OPCFoundation/UA-.NETStandard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OPCFoundation/UA-.NETStandard
Language: c%23
OPC Unified Architecture .NET Standard

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenRA/OpenRA
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenRA/OpenRA
Language: c%23
Open Source real-time strategy game engine for early Westwood games such as Command & Conquer: Red Alert written in C# using SDL and OpenGL. Runs on Windows, Linux, *BSD and Mac OS X.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Prowlarr/Prowlarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Prowlarr/Prowlarr
Language: c%23
Prowlarr is an indexer manager/proxy built on the popular *arr .net/reactjs base stack to integrate with your various PVR apps, supporting management of both Torrent Trackers and Usenet Indexers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SirDiabo/GithubLauncher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SirDiabo/GithubLauncher
Language: c%23
A Launcher that Downloads and Updates Applications from Github Releases

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sonarr/Sonarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sonarr/Sonarr
Language: c%23
Smart PVR for newsgroup and bittorrent users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer
Language: c%23
Technitium DNS Server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: builtbybel/FluentCleaner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/builtbybel/FluentCleaner
Language: c%23
A real WinUI desktop cleaner with terminal control and multi-database support

ns0:entry.ns0:title: builtbybel/FlyOOBE
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/builtbybel/FlyOOBE
Language: c%23
Fly through your Windows 11 setup 🐝

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/skills
Language: c%23
Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

ns0:entry.ns0:title: files-community/Files
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/files-community/Files
Language: c%23
A modern file manager that helps users organize their files and folders.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
Language: c%23
OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jellyfin/jellyfin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin
Language: c%23
The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
Language: c%23
Advanced UX and interoperability extension for Wand (WeMod) app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/Generative-AI-for-beginners-dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Generative-AI-for-beginners-dotnet
Language: c%23
Five lessons, learn how to really apply AI to your .NET Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/semantic-kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/semantic-kernel
Language: c%23
Integrate cutting-edge LLM technology quickly and easily into your apps

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seerge/g-helper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seerge/g-helper
Language: c%23
Lightweight Armoury Crate alternative for Asus laptops with nearly the same functionality. Works with ROG Zephyrus, Flow, TUF, Strix, Scar, ProArt, Vivobook, Zenbook, Expertbook, ROG Ally, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unchihugo/FluentFlyout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unchihugo/FluentFlyout
Language: c%23
The modern Flyout app for Windows 11, built with Fluent 2 Design principles. Media Flyouts, Taskbar Widgets and more.
